commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces MCP loopback scope headers/env with scoped bearer-token context, updates Claude live-session token fingerprinting/logging, and adds gateway/CLI regressions.

PR surface: Source +107, Tests +130. Total +237 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main authenticates the loopback bearer and then reads the security-relevant session/account/channel/event scope from mutable request headers. I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can cover every scoped token field in the live-session fingerprint and add the missing regression; maintainers still need to accept the compatibility tradeoff before merge.
